title: BEM-866 capture processor log
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
old = '          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py || echo "PROCESSOR_FAILED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md'
new = '          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py > governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_PROCESSOR_RUN_LOG.txt 2>&1 || echo "PROCESSOR_FAILED" >> governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_STEP_INLINE_HEARTBEAT.md'
if old in text:
    text = text.replace(old, new)
elif 'BEM866_PROCESSOR_RUN_LOG.txt' not in text:
    text = text.replace('          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py', new)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_PROCESSOR_LOG_CAPTURE_PATCHED.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 processor log capture patched\nStatus: PATCHED\nLog: governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_PROCESSOR_RUN_LOG.txt\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('patched processor log capture')
"""
